title: Pleodiporochna buettneri
taxonomy: Pleodiporochna buettneri is classified as a species within the genus Pleodiporochna and family Pleuroziopsaceae. This family belongs to the division Marchantiophyta, which is a division of liverworts. The division Marchantiophyta is further classified under the phylum Marchantiophyta, and the kingdom Plantae. The phylum and division share the same name, Marchantiophyta, as they are at the same taxonomic level. This classification places Pleodiporochna buettneri within the broader group of non-vascular plants.
